ocr: In a bowl, combine the butter and sugar substitute in a large bowl.
Add egg and mix until creamy and smooth.
Add the dry ingredients slowly into the wet ingredients.
Fold in the chocolate chips, if desired.
Scoop out 1 tablespoon of dough and roll into a ball.
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
spatial: The woman is standing in the center of the kitchen, holding the package in front of her. The package is positioned above the glass bowl which sits on the counter below. The wooden cabinets are behind the woman.

The person's finger points specifically to the ingredients list on the package.

ocr: COMBINE almond flour, baking powder and salt together in a large bowl. Set aside.
CREAM together the butter and sugar substitute in a large bowl until light, fluffy, pale yellow and smooth.
ADD the dry ingredients along with the wet ingredients and mix until combined. Stir in the chocolate chips.
SCOOP the dough onto a parchment lined baking sheet. Flatten each cookie with the palm of your hand.
BAKE at 350 for 12 to 15 minutes. Baking and shapes depend on the size of your cookies.
COOL on baking tray for 2 minutes then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
spatial: The hand holding the package is in the foreground, positioned above the glass bowl. The finger is pointing at the text on the package. The glass bowl containing the mixture is below the package.
